evidence: On September 26, 2025, the Company closed on a transaction for the acquisition of CalypsoAI Corp., a provider in enterprise AI security for $145.2 million in cash
we are pursuing partnerships with global leaders in AI to help deliver and secure AI workloads
we are innovating to create new offerings based on the rapidly evolving application and data security landscapes
We are selling F5 solutions in support of AI data delivery, AI runtime security and AI factory load balancing use cases

Next-generation, AI enabled bot mitigation through F5 Distributed Cloud Bot Defense...leverages AI to analyze massive amounts of traffic and machine learning to ensure sustainable bot prediction models
CalypsoAI's platform brings real-time threat defense, red teaming at scale, and data security to enterprises racing to deploy generative and agentic AI
AI solutions may use algorithms, datasets, or training methodologies that are incomplete, reflect biases, or contain other flaws or deficiencies

AI-related issues could (i) give rise to legal and/or regulatory action, including with respect to proposed legislation regulating AI in jurisdictions such as the European Union...and as a result of new applications of existing data protection, privacy, intellectual property, and other laws
Our obligations to comply with the evolving legal and regulatory landscape could entail significant costs or limit our ability to incorporate certain AI capabilities into our offerings
